title: Tissue delipidation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"68b4g","text":"This step is to wash lipids off the tissue to prevent their interferences for imaging of proteins.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Immerse the tissue section in 70%, 90%, 100% ethanol, 20s each.
